contribution_description:
[CONTRIBUTION EVENT]
- Type: Time (Minutes)
- Amount: 10
- Description: Giving feedbacks on high fidelity updates in the Beer hall
  
  Well to be very frank. It's a lot of information to process. I don't have time to read to any of it since it's not am immediate need. It's a leisure read
  
  If you value for the update it has to be user group that finds it revenant. I am guessing it's buyers and sellers, people invested in agro business or if there is a project from true sight that brings direct value to the reader who is an user or genuinely likes to read
  
  Your value should also reflect engagement. Put in on discord. Slack or even whatsapl for people who will find interest and value or just blog with categorised sections and make it a public process so you get people who are interested
  
  It's a lot of work for you. You might as well look at an agro invested community which I have told you before you. Do a bussiness canvas model .
  
  Beer hall was a place for people to share their ideas on the projects or their work. Or anything about web 3. Keep it as that. Add stuff about proposals, token, ai llm.
- Contributor(s): Anupa Dasgupta
